title: Text Generation
description: Developer generates text completions, streams responses, and receives structured or plain-text AI outputs via any supported provider.

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Uses the Ai facade or Promptable trait to send prompts and receive AI text responses

actors.name: AI Provider API
actors.description: Third-party HTTP endpoints (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, etc.) that return text completions

use_cases.name: Generate Text Completion
use_cases.description: Submit a prompt and receive a full AgentResponse (plain text or structured JSON)
use_cases.entry_point: Promptable::prompt(string $prompt, array $attachments, provider, model, timeout): AgentResponse
flow: Calls TextGateway::generateText(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options, timeout)
Gateway uses PendingRequest to POST to AI Provider API

use_cases.name: Stream Text Response
use_cases.description: Submit a prompt and receive an incrementally yielded StreamableAgentResponse
flow: Calls TextGateway::streamText(invocationId, provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, options, timeout): Generator
Gateway streams SSE/chunked response via PendingRequest

use_cases.name: Queue Text Generation
use_cases.description: Dispatch text generation as a background queue job

use_cases.name: Broadcast Streamed Response
use_cases.description: Stream text and broadcast each chunk to Laravel broadcast channels
flow: Each StreamEvent is broadcast to channels via broadcastNow/broadcast

use_cases.name: Select Provider and Model
use_cases.description: Choose a named provider (openai, anthropic, gemini, etc.) and model tier
flow: Developer specifies provider name or uses default from config('ai.default')
createXxxDriver() instantiates concrete Provider with its Gateway
Model selection also supports #[Model], #[UseCheapestModel], #[UseSmartestModel] PHP attributes

use_cases.name: Override Text Gateway (Testing/Fake)
use_cases.description: Replace the real HTTP gateway with a FakeTextGateway for testing
flow: Ai::fakeAgent() stores FakeTextGateway keyed by agent class
AiManager::textProviderFor(Agent) detects fake and calls provider->useTextGateway(FakeTextGateway)
Subsequent prompts/streams use fake responses without HTTP calls

use_cases.name: Receive Structured Output
use_cases.description: Agent implements HasStructuredOutput; response is parsed against a JSON schema
flow: Agent defines schema() returning JSON schema type map
Gateway requests structured/JSON mode from provider API

use_cases.name: Invoke Tools During Generation
use_cases.description: Provider API requests tool invocation; gateway executes tools and continues generation
flow: Gateway intercepts tool_call requests from API
Tool result fed back to API for multi-step generation

key_elements.Ai: Laravel Facade delegating to AiManager; entry point for static calls like Ai::textProvider(), Ai::textProviderFor()
key_elements.AiManager: extends MultipleInstanceManager; resolves named provider configs and instantiates concrete providers via createXxxDriver(); validates TextProvider capability
key_elements.TextProvider: Interface: prompt(AgentPrompt):AgentResponse, stream(AgentPrompt):StreamableAgentResponse, textGateway(), useTextGateway(), defaultTextModel(), cheapestTextModel(), smartestTextModel()
key_elements.TextGateway: Interface: generateText(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options, timeout):TextResponse; streamText(...):Generator; onToolInvocation(invoking, invoked)
key_elements.PendingRequest: Illuminate HTTP client (Laravel); used inside concrete gateway implementations to make authenticated HTTP calls to provider APIs
key_elements.AgentPrompt: Value object: agent, prompt string, attachments, provider, model, timeout
key_elements.AgentResponse: Result: invocationId, text, usage, meta, messages, toolCalls, toolResults, steps
key_elements.StreamableAgentResponse: Lazy wrapper around a Generator; supports ->each(), ->then() callbacks
key_elements.Promptable: Trait on Agent classes: prompt/stream/queue/broadcast methods; handles provider/model resolution and failover

key_relationships: AiManager creates TextProvider instances (OpenAiProvider, AnthropicProvider, GeminiProvider, GroqProvider, MistralProvider, OllamaProvider, DeepSeekProvider, XaiProvider, OpenRouterProvider, AzureOpenAiProvider)
TextProvider implementations use GeneratesText + StreamsText traits
TextGateway implementations (OpenAiGateway, AnthropicGateway, GeminiGateway, etc.) use PendingRequest to call AI Provider API
Promptable (Agent trait) uses AiManager::textProviderFor to get TextProvider
Promptable supports provider failover via withModelFailover()
AgentPrompt passed through middleware pipeline before reaching TextGateway
important_notes: PendingRequest is Illuminate\Http\Client\PendingRequest (Laravel HTTP facade), not a domain concept — it is an implementation detail inside gateway classes. Structured output is not supported in streaming mode. Provider/model failover is handled transparently via Promptable::withModelFailover(). Model selection via PHP attributes (#[Model], #[UseCheapestModel], #[UseSmartestModel]) or provider/model() methods on the agent.
